D_treatment: Binary democracy status lagged one calendar year
Y_outcome: Ethnic inequality in calendar year t
Z_candidate: Latent log GDP per capita lagged one calendar year
known_timing: Both D and Z are RHS variables at t-1 and precede the indexed outcome
plausible_timing: GDP is a plausible development state for subsequent inequality
ambiguous_timing: D and Z share the same annual index; transition date, GDP reference window, outcome coding window, and anticipation boundary are not documented
Z_pretreatment_assessment: Ambiguous; pre-outcome but not genuinely established as pretreatment relative to democracy
minimum_resolution: Timestamp transition and measurement windows and defend an anticipation boundary

D_treatment: Log cumulative post-office stock in the baseline regression row
Y_outcome: Five-year GDP growth led one panel period
Z_candidate: Log GDP per capita in the baseline regression row
known_timing: Panel steps are five years; Y is advanced with F.; D and Z enter the same row
plausible_timing: Baseline GDP is a plausible initial state for subsequent growth and conditional convergence
ambiguous_timing: Construction windows are not documented in the codebook and cumulative postal stock represents prior exposure that may already affect GDP
Z_pretreatment_assessment: Plausibly pre-outcome but ambiguous as pretreatment for the cumulative postal-stock contrast
minimum_resolution: Document source-year windows; separate inherited stock from new exposure; place prior postal exposure in H^-
